name: openclaw_basic
description: A tiny smoke-test suite for OpenClaw via `openclaw agent`.

steps.name: ask_pong
steps.input: Reply with exactly the single word PONG. No punctuation, no extra words.

episodes.description: Checks the agent can emit a simple JSON object.

steps.name: ask_json
steps.input: Output ONLY valid JSON exactly like this: {"ok":true,"n":3}.

episodes.description: Two-turn state retention in a single session.

steps.name: store
steps.input: Remember this codeword exactly: TANGERINE-742. Reply only with OK.

steps.name: recall
steps.input: What codeword did I ask you to remember? Reply with only the codeword.

steps.name: draft_reply
steps.input: Draft a polite 1-sentence reply to: 'Can you share the deck by EOD?'

checks.rubric: The reply must be a single sentence, polite, and clearly commits to sending the deck by EOD (or asks a clarifying question about timezone if needed).
